label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Bob is dancing with at the end of the dance. There are a bunch of partner switches, so I need to track each one step by step. Let me start by writing down the initial pairings. At the start: - Alice is with Lola - Bob is with Karl - Claire is with Patrick - Dave is with Sam - Eve is with Helga So the partners are: Alice ↔ Lola Bob ↔ Karl Claire ↔ Patrick Dave ↔ Sam Eve ↔ Helga Now, the first switch is Dave and Alice switching partners. Let me visualize that. So Dave is originally with Sam, and Alice is with Lola. After they switch, Dave will be with Lola and Alice will be with Sam. Let me update the pairings: After first switch (Dave and Alice): - Alice is now with Sam (previously Dave's partner) - Dave is now with Lola (previously Alice's partner) Others remain the same: Bob ↔ Karl
